Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 1 0 0}Hello, {f 4 1}-kun. Are you on patrol as well?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 2 0 0}...Just kidding. I plan on enjoying myself on this trip.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 3 0 0}I only hope there won't be any trouble while—[cr][n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 4 0 0}Hey there, Odagiri-kun! Have you tried these complimentary snacks?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 8 0 0}Aren't those snacks supposed to be limited to one per person?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 9 0 0}Oh, really? Oops... I ate them all. Sorry![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 11 0 0}I'll just pretend there weren't any in the first place.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 12 0 0}Sorry, Odagiri-kun. I'll check out the gift shop later to see if they'll have more snacks there.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 3 -1 -1 0 1}{f 3 1 1 0 4 13 0 0}N-No need. It's not like I wanted to try some or anything...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 1 0 0}Hello, {f 4 1}-kun. Are you on patrol as well?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 2 0 0}...Just kidding. I plan on enjoying myself on this trip.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 3 0 0}I only hope there won't be any trouble while—[cr][n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 4 0 0}Hey there, Odagiri-kun! Have you tried these complimentary snacks?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 8 0 0}Aren't those snacks supposed to be limited to one per person?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 9 0 0}Oh, really? Augh... I ate them all. Sorry![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 11 0 0}I'll just pretend there weren't any in the first place.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 12 0 0}Sorry, Odagiri-kun. I'll check out the gift shop later to see if they'll have more snacks there.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 3 -1 -1 0 1}{f 3 1 1 0 4 13 0 0}N-No need. It's not like I wanted to try some or anything...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 1 0 0}{f 4 1}-kun, you're here, too? Oh, right, you're a second-year, huh.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 2 0 0}By the way, have you tried these complimentary snacks?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 4 0 0}...You know, I haven't had the chance to try any.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 5 0 0}Care to explain why the plate is empty? Normally, these snacks are limited to one per person.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 6 0 0}Oh, really? Augh... I ate them all. Sorry![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 8 0 0}I'll just pretend there weren't any in the first place.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 9 0 0}Sorry, Odagiri-kun. I'll check out the gift shop later to see if they'll have more snacks there.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 3 -1 -1 0 1}{f 3 1 1 0 4 10 0 0}N-No need. It's not like I wanted to try some or anything...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 1 0 0}As a member of the disciplinary committee, I need to remain vigilant even on a trip like this.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 2 0 0}I only hope there won't be any trouble while—[cr][n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 3 0 0}Hey there, Odagiri-kun! Have you tried these complimentary snacks?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 5 0 0}No, I haven't had the chance to—[cr][n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 7 0 0}Aren't those snacks supposed to be limited to one per person?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 8 0 0}Oh, really? Augh... I ate them all. Sorry![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 10 0 0}I'll just pretend there weren't any in the first place.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 11 0 0}Sorry, Odagiri-kun. I'll check out the gift shop later to see if they'll have more snacks there.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 3 -1 -1 0 1}{f 3 1 1 0 4 12 0 0}N-No need. It's not like I wanted to try some or anything...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 1 0 0}Oh, hey, {f 4 1}-kun. I must say, the tour today wore me out.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 2 0 0}I was looking forward to going sightseeing around this historical city, but...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 3 0 0}Yeah, it was one thing after another today.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 4 0 0}Some of the older ladies in our tour group passed out right in front of us.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 5 0 0}I'm glad you were there, Keisuke. Thanks to you, the situation wasn't nearly as bad as it could've been.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 6 0 0}Nevertheless, it was a shocking turn of events...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 7 0 0}Yeah... Even the tour guide passed out.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 8 0 0}The way you took charge and directed traffic was really impressive though, Odagiri-kun.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 9 0 0}Have you ever considered becoming a police officer in the future?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 10 0 0}Huh...? No, I hadn't given it any thought before.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 11 0 0}...Let's head to the hot springs. I'm covered in sweat after that whole ordeal.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 12 0 0}You didn't have to get involved in that mess... But I suppose you'll never break your habit of meddling, Keisuke.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_033_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 13 0 0}Haha, the same goes to you. Pretty sure you were the first to leap into action.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_034_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 1 0 0}Oh, hey, {f 4 1}-kun. I must say, the tour today wore me out.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 2 0 0}I was looking forward to going sightseeing around this historical city, but...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_035_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 3 0 0}Yeah, it was one thing after another today.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 4 0 0}Some of the older ladies in our tour group passed out right in front of us.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_036_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 5 0 0}I'm glad you were there, Keisuke. Thanks to you, the situation wasn't nearly as bad as it could've been.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 6 0 0}Nevertheless, it was a shocking turn of events...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_037_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 7 0 0}Yeah... Even the tour guide passed out.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 8 0 0}The way you took charge and directed traffic was really impressive though, Odagiri-kun.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 9 0 0}Have you ever considered becoming a police officer in the future?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_038_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 10 0 0}Huh...? No, I hadn't given it any thought before.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 11 0 0}...Let's head to the hot springs. I'm covered in sweat after that whole ordeal.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_039_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 12 0 0}You didn't have to get involved in that mess... But I suppose you'll never break your habit of meddling, Keisuke.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_040_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 13 0 0}Ha, the same goes to you. Pretty sure you were the first to leap into action.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_041_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 2 0 0}We ran into some trouble on ours. I wanted to visit the temples, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 3 0 0}Some of the older ladies in our tour group passed out right in front of us.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_042_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 4 0 0}I'm glad you were there, Keisuke. Thanks to you, the situation wasn't nearly as bad as it could've been.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 5 0 0}Nevertheless, it was a shocking turn of events...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_043_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 6 0 0}Yeah... Even the tour guide passed out.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 7 0 0}The way you took charge and directed traffic was really impressive though, Odagiri-kun.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 8 0 0}Have you ever considered becoming a police officer in the future?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_044_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 9 0 0}Huh...? No, I hadn't given it any thought before.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 10 0 0}...Let's head to the hot springs. I'm covered in sweat after that whole ordeal.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_045_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 11 0 0}You didn't have to get involved in that mess... But I suppose you'll never break your habit of meddling, Keisuke.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_046_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 12 0 0}Haha, the same goes to you. Pretty sure you were the first to leap into action.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_048_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 2 0 0}It was one thing after another today.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 3 0 0}Some of the older ladies in our tour group passed out right in front of us.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_047_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 1 0 0}It's been a long day... I was looking forward to going sightseeing around this historical city, but...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_049_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 4 0 0}I'm glad you were there, Keisuke. Thanks to you, the situation wasn't nearly as bad as it could've been.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 5 0 0}Nevertheless, it was a shocking turn of events...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_050_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 6 0 0}Yeah... Even the tour guide passed out.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 7 0 0}The way you took charge and directed traffic was really impressive though, Odagiri-kun.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 8 0 0}Have you ever considered becoming a police officer in the future?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_051_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 9 0 0}Huh...? No, I hadn't given it any thought before.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 10 0 0}...Let's head to the hot springs. I'm covered in sweat after that whole ordeal.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_052_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 11 0 0}You didn't have to get involved in that mess... But I suppose you'll never break your habit of meddling, Keisuke.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_053_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 12 0 0}Haha, well, the same goes to you. Pretty sure you were the first to leap into action.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_054_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 1 0 0}Hey, {f 4 1}-kun. Do you happen to see any tears in my pants at all?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_055_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 3 0 0}The Kamogawa River has a nice ambience, huh?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 4 0 0}You see, Odagiri-kun was trying to skip rocks across its surface, but he lost his footing and—[cr][n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_056_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 5 0 0}Can we please drop the topic?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 6 0 0}Besides, I'd say you're partially at fault for challenging me to hit the opposite bank, Keisuke.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_057_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 7 0 0}Aw... Don't you want to see if it's possible? The wind was blowing in the perfect direction and all.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_058_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 8 0 0}What's the point in doing that?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_060_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 10 0 0}But I'm asking what good would come out of doing all that? It was still pointless.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_061_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 11 0 0}Don't you remember our elementary school days? We used to practice skipping rocks all the time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_062_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 12 0 0}...Yes, but we're in high school now. You're a third-year, for crying out loud.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_063_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 13 0 0}...Looked like you were going all out, though—to the point where you slipped and fell.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_064_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 14 0 0}...Again, can we please change the subject?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_065_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 15 0 0}Oooh, you're sooo scary, Odagiri-kun.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_066_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 16 0 0}To think, one of the last memories I make on this trip would make me feel so pathetic...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_067_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 17 0 0}It's not a big deal. I guess that other bank was just a bit farther than we thought.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_068_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 1 0 0}Hey, {f 4 1}-kun, uh... Do you happen to see any tears in my pants at all?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_069_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 3 0 0}The Kamogawa River has a nice ambience, huh?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 4 0 0}You see, Odagiri-kun was trying to skip rocks across its surface, but he lost his footing and—[cr][n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_070_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 5 0 0}Can we please drop the topic?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 6 0 0}Besides, I'd say you're partially at fault for challenging me to hit the opposite bank, Keisuke.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_071_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 7 0 0}Aw... Don't you want to see if it's possible? The wind was blowing in the perfect direction and all.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_072_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 8 0 0}What's the point in doing that?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_074_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 10 0 0}But I'm asking what good would come out of doing all that? It was still pointless.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_075_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 11 0 0}Don't you remember our elementary school days? We used to practice skipping rocks all the time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_076_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 12 0 0}...Yes, but we're in high school now. You're a third-year, for crying out loud.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_077_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 13 0 0}...It looked like you were going all out, though—to the point where you slipped and fell.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_078_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 14 0 0}...Again, can we please change the subject?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_079_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 15 0 0}Oooh, you're sooo scary, Odagiri-kun.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_080_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 16 0 0}To think, one of the last memories I make on this trip would make me feel so pathetic...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_081_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 17 0 0}It's not a big deal. I guess that other bank was just a bit farther than we thought.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_082_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 1 0 0}You there. Do you happen to see any tears in my pants at all?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_083_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 3 0 0}The Kamogawa River has a nice ambience, huh?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 4 0 0}You see, Odagiri-kun was trying to skip rocks across its surface, but he lost his footing and—[cr][n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_084_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 5 0 0}Can we please drop the topic?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 6 0 0}Besides, I'd say you're partially at fault for challenging me to hit the opposite bank, Keisuke.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_085_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 7 0 0}Aw... Don't you want to see if it's possible? The wind was blowing in the perfect direction and all.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_086_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 8 0 0}What's the point in doing that?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_088_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 10 0 0}But I'm asking what good would come out of doing all that? It was still pointless.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_089_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 11 0 0}Don't you remember our elementary school days? We used to practice skipping rocks all the time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_090_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 12 0 0}...Yes, but we're in high school now. You're a third-year, for crying out loud.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_091_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 13 0 0}...It looked like you were going all out, though—to the point where you slipped and fell.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_092_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 14 0 0}...Again, can we please change the subject?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_093_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 15 0 0}Oooh, you're sooo scary, Odagiri-kun.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_094_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 16 0 0}To think, one of the last memories I make on this trip would make me feel so pathetic...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_095_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 17 0 0}Hey, it's not a big deal. I guess that other bank was just a bit farther than we thought.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_096_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 1 0 0}You there. Do you happen to see any tears in my pants at all?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_097_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 3 0 0}The Kamogawa River has a nice ambience, huh?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 4 0 0}You see, Odagiri-kun was trying to skip rocks across its surface, but he lost his footing and—[cr][n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_098_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 5 0 0}Can we please drop the topic?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 6 0 0}Besides, I'd say you're partially at fault for challenging me to hit the opposite bank, Keisuke.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_099_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 7 0 0}Aw... Don't you want to see if it's possible? The wind was blowing in the perfect direction and all.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_100_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 8 0 0}What's the point in doing that?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_102_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 10 0 0}But I'm asking what good would come out of doing all that? It was still pointless.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_103_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 11 0 0}Don't you remember our elementary school days? We used to practice skipping rocks all the time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_104_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 12 0 0}...Yes, but we're in high school now. You're a third-year, for crying out loud.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_105_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 13 0 0}...It looked like you were going all out, though—to the point where you slipped and fell.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_106_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 14 0 0}...Again, can we please change the subject?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_107_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 15 0 0}Oooh, you're sooo scary, Odagiri-kun.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_108_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 16 0 0}To think, one of the last memories I make on this trip would make me feel so pathetic...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_109_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 17 0 0}It's not a big deal. I guess that other bank was just a bit farther than we thought.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_110_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}Hey, are my pants dirty?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}A deer ate the treat I had in my pocket...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_111_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}I didn't know there were deer in Kyoto. But you know, with the deer treat, Odagiri-kun was...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_112_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}Can we not talk about it?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}If you hadn't said you wanted to ride a deer...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_113_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}Didn't you want to ride it, too? It seems like its horns would make perfect handlebars...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_114_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}And what would be the point of riding it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_117_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}But we did all sorts of things like that when we were in elementary school![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_118_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}Yes... And now we're in high school. You're a third-year.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_120_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}...Can we please change the subject?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_121_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}You're a scary guy, Odagiri-kun...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_122_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}Hey, are my pants dirty?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}A deer ate the treat I had in my pocket...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_123_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I didn't know there were deer in Kyoto too. Odagiri-kun, you know, deer crackers...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_124_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}Can we not talk about it?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}If you hadn't said you wanted to ride a deer...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_125_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Didn't you want to ride it, too? It seems like its horns would make perfect handlebars...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_126_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}And what would be the point of riding it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_127_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I don't know... It'd be cool?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_129_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}But we did all sorts of things like that when we were in elementary school![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_130_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}Yes... And now we're in high school. You're a third-year.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_131_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}But... the deer treat...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_132_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}...Can we please change the subject?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_133_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}You're a scary guy, Odagiri-kun...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_134_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Hey, are my pants dirty?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A deer ate the treat I had in my pocket...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_135_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}I didn't know there were deer in Kyoto too. Odagiri-kun, you know, deer crackers...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_136_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Can we not talk about it?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}If you hadn't said you wanted to ride a deer...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_137_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}Didn't you want to ride it, too? It seems like its horns would make perfect handlebars...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_138_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}And what would be the point of riding it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_140_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}No, it wouldn't.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_141_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}But we did all sorts of things like that when we were in elementary school![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_142_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Yes... And now we're in high school. You're a third-year.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_144_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}...Can we please change the subject?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_145_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}You're a scary guy, Odagiri-kun...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_146_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Hey, are my pants dirty?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A deer ate the treat I had in my pocket...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_147_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I didn't know there were deer in Kyoto too. Odagiri-kun, you know, deer crackers...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_148_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Can we not talk about it?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}If you hadn't said you wanted to ride a deer...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_149_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Didn't you want to ride it, too? It seems like its horns would make perfect handlebars...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_150_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}And what would be the point of riding it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_151_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I don't know... It'd be cool?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_152_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}No, it wouldn't.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_153_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}But we did all sorts of things like that when we were in elementary school![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_154_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Yes... And now we're in high school. You're a third-year.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_155_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}But... the deer treat...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_156_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}...Can we please change the subject?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_157_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}You're a scary guy, Odagiri-kun...[n]{f 1 1}
